title: Ex-Chinese president Hu Jintao mysteriously escorted out in front of Xi Jinping
description: Hu Jintao, 79, was removed by unnamed Chinese Communist Party (CCP) agents during today's closing ceremony of the congress, which is held once in five years.
keywords: China, Xi Jingping, Hu Jintao, Communist Party
snippet:
Former Chinese president Hu Jintao mysteriously escorted out in front of Xi Jinping | ANI
